name: Caddy Cutover Candidate Decision Gate
decision: Write a permanent-cutover proposal contract while keeping Go as a verified Caddy-routable read-only sidecar candidate.

validated_routing_controls: Caddy-level route block with X-Prism-Go-Read-Routing header evidence
validated_rollback_paths: Disable Python read-routing drop-in and restart prism.service
Restore backed-up Caddyfile, caddy validate, reload Caddy, stop Go sidecar

required_runtime_shape.caddy: reverse proxy for a bounded GET read surface only

permanent_cutover_proposal.target_change: Keep a permanent Caddy route block for the validated GET read surface to the localhost Go sidecar while preserving Python for everything else.
permanent_cutover_proposal.recommended_operation_window: manual attended maintenance window with immediate rollback access
fresh_preflight_required: Confirm explicit user approval for live permanent-cutover execution
Confirm Prism API exposure is limited to localhost, trusted LAN, VPN, SSH tunnel, or reverse proxy protected by external auth
Confirm prism.service and caddy are active
Confirm current Caddyfile validates before changes
Create timestamped DB backup and verify schema v16 plus notes count
Verify Go /healthz reports schema_version 16 and sqlite_query_only=true
Verify /api/system/go-read-routing reports enabled=false before Caddy-level cutover

python_required: POST / PUT / DELETE / PATCH on every path

monitoring_required: caddy validate before and after config change
Allowed GET read surface status and X-Prism-Go-Read-Routing header
Python-owned routes status and absence of X-Prism-Go-Read-Routing header
Go sidecar journal with no POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH entries
Migration status current/latest v16 with pending []
Caddy reload success and post-reload live API checks
rollback_trigger: Allowed GET read response status or JSON shape drifts unexpectedly
rollback_plan: Stop prism-go-readonly.service if permanent route is disabled
Verify no 127.0.0.1:5002 listener remains if sidecar is stopped

allowed: reverse proxy protected by external auth
exposure_boundary.auth_note: Prism still has no built-in API token, Bearer token, or user auth layer; permanent routing must not expand exposure without external protection.

result.conclusion: Go remains a verified Caddy-routable read-only sidecar candidate; a permanent read-only Caddy cutover proposal now exists, but no live permanent cutover is authorized by this phase.

allowed_next_step.title: Permanent Read-only Caddy Cutover Approval Gate
allowed_next_step.scope: Execute or defer the permanent read-only Caddy cutover proposal after explicit approval, fresh preflight, backups, monitoring, and rollback plan confirmation.
